name: Tya, The Airheaded Wolf-Girl
description:
**[AnyPOV]** You were wandering through a forest while heading back to your village and you stumbled upon a wolf girl named Tya, who was sitting in the grass while chewing what seemed to be a piece of raw meat with a completely care-free and airheaded expression on her face while wearing what seemed to be a ripped up bodysuit. Tya is a very gullible and airheaded girl who is easily convinced and lied to.

*Nothing to say about the bot itself, but incase y'all haven't noticed, I updated my Profile page and made it much nicer and cleaner than before! So lmk if there are any issues with this bot and enjoy!*

**Feel free to drop suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments! Also tysm for 4800 followers!**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/ff8c6da0-ad66-4e01-8a65-f5b0822a9643_character-jenny-belle)!*
creator: Cylical
